headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Enrolls First Patients In Global Faraflex AFib Trial
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) has enrolled the first patients in the global FARADIGM trial. The study evaluates the Faraflex pulsed field ablation device for the treatment of atrial fibrillation. This milestone marks the formal start of large scale clinical testing for the Faraflex system. Boston Scientific is a major player in cardiac rhythm and electrophysiology devices, and the FARADIGM trial adds another clinical program to that portfolio. Atrial fibrillation treatments have been an area...
